_comment: Install the server first: `npm i -g @team-monet/monet`. Recommended: register at USER scope so it's in every project — `claude mcp add --scope user monet -- monet start` (or merge this entry into ~/.claude.json). Per-repo instead: write it to ./.mcp.json. Reload Claude Code after. Storage defaults to the global ~/.monet (organized per project by circle); set env.MONET_STORAGE_DIR for a per-repo store. First launch downloads the MiniLM model once. Zero-install alt: command 'npx', args ['-y','@team-monet/monet','start'].
